nodes.label: CipherManagerTest.kt
CipherManagerTest
.setup()
.tearDown()
.`createCipher with no active user should return CreateCipherResult failure`()
.`createCipher with encryptCipher failure should return CreateCipherResult failure`()
.`createCipher with ciphersService createCipher failure should return CreateCipherResult failure`()
.`createCipher with ciphersService createCipher Invalid response should return CreateCipherResult failure`()
.`createCipher with ciphersService createCipher success should return CreateCipherResult success and increment addCipherActionCount`()
.`createCipherInOrganization with no active user should return CreateCipherResult Error`()
.`createCipherInOrganization with encryptCipher failure should return CreateCipherResult Error`()
.`createCipherInOrganization with ciphersService createCipher failure should return CreateCipherResult Error`()
.`createCipherInOrganization with ciphersService createCipher Invalid response should return CreateCipherResult failure`()
.`createCipherInOrganization with ciphersService createCipher success should return CreateCipherResult success and increment addCipherActionCount`()
.`updateCipher with no active user should return UpdateCipherResult Error`()
.`updateCipher with encryptCipher failure should return UpdateCipherResult failure`()
.`updateCipher with ciphersService updateCipher failure should return UpdateCipherResult Error with a null message`()
.`updateCipher with ciphersService updateCipher Invalid response should return UpdateCipherResult Error with a non-null message`()
.`updateCipher with ciphersService updateCipher Success response should return UpdateCipherResult success`()
.`getCipher with no active user should return Failure`()
.`getCipher with decryption error should return Failure`()
.`getCipher with no cipher found should return CipherNotFound`()
.`getCipher with cipher found should return Success`()
.`archiveCipher with no active user should return ArchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`archiveCipher with ciphersService archiveCipher failure should return ArchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`archiveCipher with ciphersService archiveCipher invalid should return ArchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`archiveCipher with ciphersService archiveCipher success should return ArchiveCipherResult success`()
.`unarchiveCipher with no active user should return UnarchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`unarchiveCipher with ciphersService unarchiveCipher failure should return UnarchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`unarchiveCipher with ciphersService unarchiveCipher invalid should return UnarchiveCipherResult Error`()
.`unarchiveCipher with ciphersService unarchiveCipher success should return UnarchiveCipherResult success`()
.`hardDeleteCipher with no active user should return DeleteCipherResult Error`()
.`hardDeleteCipher with ciphersService hardDeleteCipher failure should return DeleteCipherResult Error`()
.`hardDeleteCipher with ciphersService hardDeleteCipher success should return DeleteCipherResult success`()
.`softDeleteCipher with no active user should return DeleteCipherResult Error`()
.`softDeleteCipher with ciphersService softDeleteCipher failure should return DeleteCipherResult Error`()
.`softDeleteCipher with ciphersService softDeleteCipher success should return DeleteCipherResult success`()
.`softDeleteCipher with cipher migration success should return DeleteCipherResult success`()
.`deleteCipherAttachment with no active user should return DeleteAttachmentResult Error`()
.`deleteCipherAttachment with ciphersService deleteCipherAttachment failure should return DeleteAttachmentResult Error`()
.`deleteCipherAttachment with ciphersService deleteCipherAttachment success should return DeleteAttachmentResult success`()
.`restoreCipher with no active user should return RestoreCipherResult Error`()
.`restoreCipher with ciphersService restoreCipher failure should return RestoreCipherResult Error`()
.`restoreCipher with ciphersService restoreCipher success should return RestoreCipherResult success`()
.`shareCipher with no active user should return ShareCipherResult Error`()
.`shareCipher with cipherService shareCipher success should return ShareCipherResultSuccess`()
.`shareCipher with attachment migration success should return ShareCipherResultSuccess`()
.`shareCipher with cipherService shareCipher failure should return ShareCipherResultError`()
.`shareCipher with cipherService encryptCipher failure should return ShareCipherResultError`()
.`updateCipherCollections with no active user should return ShareCipherResult Error`()
.`updateCipherCollections with cipherService updateCipherCollections success should return ShareCipherResultSuccess`()
.`updateCipherCollections with updateCipherCollections shareCipher failure should return ShareCipherResultError`()
.`updateCipherCollections with updateCipherCollections encryptCipher failure should return ShareCipherResultError`()
.`createAttachment with no active user should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with encryptCipher failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with encryptAttachment failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with uriToByteArray failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with createAttachment failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with uploadAttachment failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with decryptCipher failure should return CreateAttachmentResult Error`()
.`createAttachment with createAttachment success should return CreateAttachmentResult Success`()
.`createAttachment should delete temp files after upload success`()
.`createAttachment should delete temp files after upload failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with missing attachment should return Failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with failed attachment details request should return Failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with attachment details missing url should return Failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with failed download should return Failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with failed decryption should delete file and return Failure`()
.`downloadAttachment with successful decryption should delete file and return Success`()
.`syncCipherDeleteFlow should delete cipher from disk`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow create with local cipher with no common collections should do nothing`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow create with local cipher, and with common collections, should make a request and save cipher to disk`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow update with no local cipher, but with common collections, should make a request save cipher to disk`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow update with no local cipher should do nothing`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow update with more recent local cipher should do nothing`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow update failure with 404 code should make a request for a cipher and then delete it`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow create failure with 404 code should make a request for a cipher and do nothing`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow valid create success should make a request for a cipher and then store it`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow valid update success should make a request for a cipher and then store it`()
.`syncCipherUpsertFlow with inactive userId should clear the last sync time`()
.`hardDeleteCipher with CookieRedirectException should return DeleteCipherResult Error with errorMessage`()
.`softDeleteCipher with CookieRedirectException should return DeleteCipherResult Error with errorMessage`()
.`restoreCipher with CookieRedirectException should return RestoreCipherResult Error with errorMessage`()
.`archiveCipher with CookieRedirectException should return ArchiveCipherResult Error with errorMessage`()
.setupMockUri()
